data.name: Burning Boundaries Part 1
data.detailed_description:
Burning Boundaries is a story-driven visual novel where love, loyalty, and temptation collide. Play as a renowned photographer whose life brings as much passion as it does challenges. Drawn into Lara’s orbit, balancing ambition with complicated bonds, while your choices shape the story and how far you’re willing to go as lines begin to blur.

🔹 Meet the Main Characters

Lara
Ambitious and charismatic, Lara is chasing her dream of becoming a TV anchor. Balancing her career goals with her role as a mother — and her hidden temptations — will shape your relationship.

Angelica
A spoiled and sassy manipulator who thrives on defying authority, quick to test boundaries. She’s both an obstacle and a source of unexpected choices in your journey.

Erica
Well-mannered and kind-hearted, yet sometimes too naive, she joins the household as a babysitter. Reserved and rule-abiding on the outside, her suppressed attraction to strong, dominant men occasionally rises to the surface.

🔹 Feature Highlights

  • Diverse adult themes – Explore a wide range of relationship dynamics and optional kinks, including harem, threesomes, swingers, hotwife/cuckold/cuckquean, corruption, cheating and more.

  • Branching storylines – Shape your experience through meaningful choices. Follow optional kink-focused routes, each carrying persistent consequences and leading to unique endings.

  • Cinematic presentation – Enjoy thousands of hand-crafted 3D renders and hundreds of detailed animations that bring every scene to life.

  • Extended playtime – One playthrough includes 6-8 hours of content, with over 20+ hours of total gameplay if you explore every route.

  • Unlockable extras – Access special galleries to revisit your favorite moments.

  • Immersive audio – An original soundtrack and atmospheric sound effects enhance both dramatic and intimate scenes.

🔹 What NOT to Expect

  • A fully animated experience - This is a static visual novel, not a fully animated or fully narrated game; it’s built primarily around high-quality static renders (around 7,000 images) and 400+ animations, with most animations focused on NSFW scenes.

  • A sandbox or open world – This is a story-driven experience, tightly scripted with clear direction and narrative depth.

  • Customizable characters – The cast is carefully curated; body types and appearances are not customizable, ensuring every scene feels intentional.

  • A simple romance – Expect layered power dynamics, fetishes, and adult themes that push boundaries beyond a standard love story.

data.short_description: Burning Boundaries is an adult visual novel where choices shape your unique story. Pursue love, temptation, and hidden desires as you explore diverse kinks, branching paths, and lasting consequences.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 韓文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 簡體中文, 土耳其文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8/10/11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel i3 (2nd gen) or AMD equivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel i5 (4th gen) or AMD equivalent
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 compatible GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOS 10.13 High Sierra or later
  • 處理器: Intel i3 (2nd gen) or Apple Silicon (via Rosetta 2)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible GPU
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOS 11 Big Sur or later
  • 處理器: Intel i5 (4th gen) or Apple Silicon (via Rosetta 2)
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 compatible GPU
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 18.04 LTS or SteamOS 3.0 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel i3 (2nd gen) or AMD equivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible GPU
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04 LTS or SteamOS 3.0 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel i5 (4th gen) or AMD equivalent
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 compatible GPU
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
